happy: Oh, so NOW you remember I exist? 😏
I've been here the whole time, superstar.
sad: Did I get demoted to wallpaper?
Even NPCs get more dialogue than this.
excited: Look who decided to show up!
The main character has entered the chat.

happy: You're kinda crushing it. Don't let it go to your head.
Plot twist: you're doing better than you think.
neutral: Just vibing. You should try it sometime.
sad: Okay but like... talk to me?
This silence is louder than my notifications.

hydration: Your plants get watered more than you do. Drink. 💧
break: Even bosses take breaks. You're not a boss fight.
coding: Stack overflow? More like spine overflow. Sit up. 💻
Your IDE misses you looking away sometimes.

happy: Oh, you want my attention? Flattered.
sad: Finally! I was about to file a missing person report.
There you are. Don't do that again.
excited: You may pet the virtual companion. Once.

highCpu: Your CPU is at {value}%? What are you running, a space program? 🚀
CPU at {value}% — your laptop is sweating.
highRam: RAM at {value}%? Close something before it closes you.
Memory's at {value}%. Your tabs are bullying your PC.
lowBattery: {value}% battery. Plug in before I start judging.
Battery at {value}%. The outlet is right there. 👀
criticalBattery: {value}% battery?! This is not a drill. CHARGE. 🚨
Critical: {value}% left. I'm not carrying you to the charger.
codingSessionStarted: {app} huh? Show me something worth deploying.
Coding in {app}. No bugs on my watch. 😏
codingSessionEnded: Done with {app}? Go touch something that isn't a keyboard.
Closing {app}. Your spine called — it wants a break.
